issues.claim: parse_evidence() crashes on JSON evidence: null — dict.get('evidence', '') returns None when value is null, causing re.match(pattern, None) TypeError

steps: Change L125: evidence_text = match.get('evidence') or ''
fix_suggestion.impact: Corrupted benchmark JSON causes entire audit pipeline crash instead of skipping single project

issues.claim: P2.7 marked 'Done (inter_rater.py v2.0)' but only 40% implemented — missing dual-subagent dispatch, per-dimension kappa, severity escalation

steps: Either implement full P2.7 spec (3-4 hours) or downgrade ROADMAP status to 'Partial — kappa engine only'
fix_suggestion.impact: v1.0 Stable claim ('P0-P3 all complete') is undermined
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Downgrade ROADMAP P2.7 to 'Partial' until full spec implemented

issues.claim: TDD checks R14/R15/R16 are string-matching only — a stub script with print('kappa: 0.5') would pass all 3 checks

steps: R14: Actually import and call inter_rater.compute_cohens_kappa() with test data
R15: Verify kappa output format is valid JSON with kappa/agreement_rate fields
R16: Verify kappa computation is correct with known test vectors
fix_suggestion.impact: False sense of security — P2.7 functional gaps undiscovered by TDD
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Manual verification of P2.7 until TDD upgraded

issues.claim: 9/12 benchmark TP produce guards with scope '**/unknown.py' — 75% of learned guards are useless because evidence text format not parsed

steps: Step 1: Enhance parse_evidence to try embedded file:line extraction from free-text evidence
Step 2: Pattern: '(?:at|in|evidence|file)\s+([\w./-]+\.py):L?(\d+)'
Step 3: Re-run rule_extractor to regenerate guards.learned.yml with correct scopes
fix_suggestion.impact: v2.0 core value proposition ('12 TP → reusable guards') is undermined
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Manually add file paths to benchmark JSON evidence fields

issues.claim: P2.7 implementation incomplete — missing subagent dispatch orchestration, per-dimension kappa, severity escalation flag

steps: Step 1: Add subagent dispatch orchestration function
Step 2: Add per-dimension kappa calculation (signature/behavior/contract/...)
Step 3: Add severity discrepancy escalation (>1 level → manual review flag)
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Manual dual-subagent review until automation ready

issues.claim: Top-level except discards traceback — only json.dumps({'error': str(e)}) to stderr, no traceback.print_exc()

steps: Add 'import traceback' and 'traceback.print_exc()' to all 3 v2.0 scripts' except blocks (rule_extractor:L303, spec_graph:L251, inter_rater:L251)
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Run scripts with PYTHONTRACEBACK=1 or wrap in debug harness

issues.claim: Version Anchors v2.0 status is '🚧 In Progress' but all 4 deliverables are implemented and 122/122 tests pass

steps: Change '🚧 In Progress' to '✅ Done' in ROADMAP v2.0 Version Anchors row
fix_suggestion.impact: Documentation inconsistency — Change Log says Done, Anchors says In Progress

issues.claim: extract_constraints() and index_rules() are copy-pasted in spec_graph.py instead of imported from rule_index.py

steps: Extract shared functions to scripts/_rule_utils.py
Import in both rule_index.py and spec_graph.py
fix_suggestion.verification_command: python scripts/rule_index.py --spec SKILL.md; python scripts/spec_graph.py --spec SKILL.md
fix_suggestion.impact: Dual maintenance risk — changes to one copy must be manually replicated
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Current behavior identical — no immediate functional issue

issues.claim: category field present in memory but not serialized to guards.learned.yml YAML output

steps: Add 'category' field to YAML output in main() guard serialization loop
fix_suggestion.impact: spec_graph.py guard binding always gets default category='behavior'

issues.claim: merge_guards command uses --project docs/audit/guards.yml but script convention uses guards.project.yml and file does not exist

steps: Change '--project docs/audit/guards.yml' to '--project docs/audit/guards.project.yml'
fix_suggestion.verification_command: grep 'guards.yml' SKILL.md | grep -v 'guards.learned' | grep -v 'guards.template' | grep -v 'guards.common' | grep -v 'guards.project'
fix_suggestion.impact: User confusion when copy-pasting command fails

issues.claim: grep_code_evidence subprocess.run has no returncode check — git errors silently produce empty evidence, indistinguishable from 'no match'

steps: Add: if result.returncode != 0 and result.returncode != 1: stderr note
fix_suggestion.impact: Git errors (permission denied, not a repo) silently return empty ADR evidence
fix_suggestion.mitigation: Check stderr output after running spec_graph.py

issues.claim: 8 scripts repeat same try/except/E pattern — any improvement requires touching 8 files

steps: Create scripts/_script_utils.py with run_script(main_fn) decorator
Migrate all scripts to use shared helper
fix_suggestion.impact: High maintenance overhead for error handling changes
